special_offer: SPECIAL OFFER: Until 23rd July 2026, the sign-up bonus on the HSBC Premier Credit Card is increased to 30,000 HSBC points, which converts to 15,000 airline miles or hotel points.
hsbc_conclusion: Since Barclaycard launched the free Barclaycard Avios Mastercard ( apply here , review here ) earning 1 Avios per £1 and giving an annual Avios upgrade voucher, the HSBC Premier Credit Card has little value to the Avios collector.
